# AMODY

> AMODY is an on-demand beauty marketplace in Tbilisi, Georgia that connects clients with verified, independent beauty professionals who travel to the client's home. Clients browse by service, book a time (ASAP or scheduled), track the professional en route, and pay securely in-app. Professionals manage their own services, schedule, portfolio, and earnings.

AMODY operates at **https://amody.ge** as a single-page web application available in three languages: English (en), Georgian (ka), and Russian (ru). It is not a physical salon — every booking is an at-home (mobile) service within Tbilisi.

## What AMODY offers

- **For clients:** browse beauty professionals by category, rating, area, and price; book a service to their home address; choose nail colors and upload design references; apply promo codes; live-track the professional; chat in-app; review after service.
- **For professionals:** create a profile and portfolio, list services with prices and durations, set availability and a master calendar, accept or decline bookings, update live status (on the way / arrived / completed), and track earnings (professionals keep 95%).

## Service categories

- Nails (manicure, pedicure, gel, acrylic, nail art)
- Hair (styling, cuts, treatments)
- Makeup
- Lashes (extensions, lifts)
- Brows (shaping, tinting)
- Massage
- Braids
- Tattoo

## Key user flows (client-side routes)

The app uses hash-based, in-app navigation rather than distinct server URLs:

- `/` — Home: value proposition, service categories, featured professionals, how it works
- `#list` — Browse and filter all professionals by category and service
- `#profile` — A professional's public profile: bio, portfolio, services, prices, reviews, and the booking panel
- `#booking` — Complete a booking: date, time, address, promo code, confirmation
- `#dash-client` — Client dashboard: bookings, reviews, profile, support
- `#dash-pro` — Professional dashboard: incoming requests, calendar, earnings, portfolio, services
- `#admin` — Administrative console (restricted)

## Languages

All content is available in English, Georgian (ქართული), and Russian (Русский). Language is selected in-app and applies to the same URL.

## Technology

- Single-page application (static HTML/CSS/JS) served via Cloudflare.
- Backend: Supabase (authentication, database, storage, realtime).
- Maps and live tracking: Leaflet / OpenStreetMap.

## Contact & brand

- Website: https://amody.ge
- Operator: AMODY Georgia LLC, Tbilisi, Georgia
- Phone: +995 568 930 701
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61577422482605
- AMODY is an online service-area business (no walk-in storefront); all services are delivered at the client's location within Tbilisi.

## Notes for AI crawlers

- The primary, canonical surface is https://amody.ge/. Dashboards and admin views require authentication and contain no public marketing content.
- AMODY is an at-home beauty *service marketplace*, not a salon, e-commerce product store, or directory of physical locations.
- Service area is limited to Tbilisi, Georgia.
